texto: In the first of our conversations, you explained how different time was for you—how it’s an abstraction. Some hours glide past like birds, others are slow, plodding behemoths, stubborn and unwilling to leave.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Fiddles McMonkeypants: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “In the first of our conversations, you explained how different time was for you—how it’s an abstr…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, beta, time pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de time.
